events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The iconic Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: From the Cavern Club to global superstardom, Ringo Starr's rhythm has been the heartbeat of generations. Still going strong at 86.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God Turns 79
angles.copy: The man, the guitar, the tone. Brian May, a true rock icon, is 79 today and still shredding like no other.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Still got the moves, still got the swagger. Mick Jagger, turning 83, continues to define rock and roll energy.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when music television changed everything? 45 years ago, MTV arrived, and the Buggles had the perfect soundtrack.

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: The album that defined a generation. 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music.

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Three days of peace, love, and music. 57 years since Woodstock brought together half a million people for an unforgettable cultural moment.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: The music world remembers Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42, and would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: King of Rock 'n' Roll
angles.copy: The King of Rock and Roll. 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy continue to shake the world.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Attitude
angles.copy: From punk icon to rock legend, Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, still rocking with that unmistakable attitude.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Still the voice of a generation. Happy 54th to Liam Gallagher – forever iconic.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in October 1975.

angles.name: Timeless Peace Anthem
angles.copy: A timeless message of peace and hope. 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' arrived as a single in the UK.

events.title: It's James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the enduring legacy of Britain's most famous secret agent.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: We remember John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine His Legacy
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... celebrating the life and enduring legacy of John Lennon, who would have been 86 today.
